appraisal_events.evidence: Il écoutait mes explications, me répondait avec précision... j'étais comme un homme qui... un médecin... lui enlève... un grain de sable; le malade est guéri et rassuré. Tous mes tracas se résolvaient en un télégramme que Robert de Saint-Loup se chargeait de faire partir. — ...on a besoin de moi.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator elevates Saint-Loup as energetic, competent, and benevolent, likening his help to a doctor's gentle cure and showing him as both personally effective and professionally needed.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally esteemed as decisive, helpful, and considerate; his intervention swiftly resolves the narrator’s troubles and he is depicted as in demand.
